headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
summary: Companies that consistently increase their sales, margins, or returns on capital are usually rewarded with the best returns, and those that can do all three for years on end are almost always the legendary stocks that return 100 times your money.

raw.headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
raw.summary: Companies that consistently increase their sales, margins, or returns on capital are usually rewarded with the best returns, and those that can do all three for years on end are almost always the legendary stocks that return 100 times your money.

headline: Will Quanta Services (PWR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Quanta Services (PWR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $713
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $643 to $713.
